---
title: "Margaret Bruce"
---

## Margaret Bruce

**Dates:** (d. 11 Sept 1913)

**Maiden name:** (Renshaw)

### Description

called Lady Frederick Bruce, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1883)

### Biography

She married (21 Aug 1873) Lord Charles Frederick Bruce (1849-1936). [PB]

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 4th  [1901]
- Letter from February 27 [1893]
- Letter from Novr 4th 1892
- Letter from November 23. [1888?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
